output: Required task/SPEC status updates, active-plan removal, completed-plan routing, and successor/reason/provenance evidence for lifecycle transitions.
Required artifact and Git identity, environment, actor/authority, observedAt, digest, commands/postconditions, limitations, nonclaims, rollback, and retained failed/inconclusive state.
Preserved the earlier provider result as inconclusive and refused to create the future HGI-305 verification owner prematurely.
limitations: Local closeout proof cannot upgrade an inconclusive provider check or establish external state.
nonClaims: Lifecycle acceptance grants no provider, workflow, deployment, credential, release, or production authority.
